summary: Tested 5 new features: Role-based rates, Order notes display, MR payment recording with admin approval, MR name on orders, Order transfer to agency. Backend: 16/17 tests passed (1 minor test assertion issue). Frontend: All features working after Badge import fix.

minor.issue: Response returns minimal object (id, message, order_number, status) instead of full order - not a bug, just API design. Order is correctly created with source='mr', mr_name, and notes.

bugs_fixed.issue: Badge component was used but not imported, causing 'Badge is not defined' runtime error when clicking MR Approvals tab

seed_data_creation: Created test payment requests and orders during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 features verified working: 1) Role-based rates: Items have rate_doctors/rate_medicals/rate_agencies fields, MROrders.jsx getRoleRate() function uses correct rate based on customer type. 2) Order notes: Displayed in admin Orders page with 'Notes:' prefix. 3) MR payment recording: MRPayments.jsx page with Record Payment button, creates payment_requests, admin approves/rejects via Payments.jsx MR Approvals tab. 4) MR name: Shows as 'Submitted by: {mr_name}' on MR orders in admin Orders page. 5) Order transfer: Transfer button on non-terminal orders, POST /api/orders/{id}/transfer updates status to 'transferred' with agency details.

MR Login.POST /api/mr/login: PASS - Returns access_token and mr object

Orders Endpoint.GET /api/orders returns new fields: PASS - notes, mr_name, source, customer_type, transferred_to_agency_* fields present

Order Transfer.POST /api/orders/{id}/transfer: PASS - Updates order status to 'transferred' with agency details
Order Transfer.Transfer button in UI: PASS - 80 transfer buttons found for non-terminal orders

MR Payment Requests.POST /api/payment-requests/{id}/approve: PASS - Creates payment record, updates status
MR Payment Requests.MR Payments page UI: PASS - Record Payment button, form with customer search, amount, mode, notes
MR Payment Requests.Admin MR Approvals tab: PASS - Shows pending requests with Approve/Reject buttons

Role-based Rates.MR Order form uses getRoleRate(): PASS - Function in MROrders.jsx selects correct rate based on customer type
